name: Raspberry-Chocolate Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a square pan, 9 x 9 inches.
Prepare the streusel and set aside. Beat remaining ingredients (except chips and raspberries) on low speed for 30 seconds. Then beat on medium speed for 2 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally. Spread half of the batter in the pan. Sprinkle with half each of the chips, raspberries, and streusel. Repeat with the remaining batter, chips, raspberries, and streusel. Bake for about 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Serve warm or cool.
